# archestra_tool (Data Source)

Looks up a tool by name. This includes built-in tools (e.g., `archestra__whoami`) and MCP server tools.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the tool to look up

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Tool description
- `id` (String) Tool identifier
